creator: toxic@doobie.com
text:
Several skins have been updated or added upstream, including the default.  Because the old versions are no longer available on the master sites, the port will not build with any of them selected, unless you've already got them in /usr/ports/distfiles.  This patch brings everything up to date.  

Skins updated to newer versions: Abyss, Default, Default-small, hwsw.  
New skins added: Atir, Clearlooks, ICY, pcland, nativeRed.

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build port with all skins enabled and an empty distfiles area.
